challenge.label: Road to Mallorca — 15,000 km as a team

highlights.title: Hottest streak
highlights.text: Ebi is on a 16-day streak — keep it alive.

highlights.title: This week's leader
highlights.text: Ebi tops the team with 251.8 km across all sports this week.

highlights.title: Biggest session
highlights.text: Ebi logged a 128.8 km bike — the week's longest.

highlights.title: On the up
highlights.text: Ebi is up 74 km on last week — momentum building.

highlights.title: Road to Mallorca
highlights.text: Together you've covered 11823.9 of 15000 km (78.8%) toward the team goal.

highlights.title: King of the mountains
highlights.text: Ebi climbed 2157 m this week — the most of anyone.
